title: Pastel Warped & Crimson Planks
description: Ever wanted pastel lavender and pastel blue planks and wood? This pack transforms crimson and warped planks into soft, soothing colors, giving Minecraft a fresh look that’s still close to the vanilla style.
body: Ever wanted pastel lavender and pastel blue planks and wood? This pack transforms crimson and warped planks into soft, soothing colors, giving Minecraft a fresh look that’s still close to the vanilla style.
